titleStmt.title: SII 25.156: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 156. (A.R. No. 156 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription in the absence of the praśasti, may be assigned to the 10th Century A.D. on grounds of palaeography.

It records the gift of a silver plate for the purpose of food-offerings, a sliver pot (kalaśap-pāṉai) and a chouri with gold handle to the deity of the temple of Siddhēśvaram-uḍaiya-mahādēvar at Tirunaṟaiyūr, a dēvadāṉa in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu by Uḍaiyapirāṭṭiyār Śembiyaṉ Mahādēviyār alias Pirāntakaṉ-Mādēvaḍigaḷār.

This record which mentions the queen Sembiyaṉ Mādēvaḍigaḷ same as Sembiyaṉ-Mahādēviyār is known to have lived long enough till the time of Rājarāja I. Hence, the record under study may be assigned to the reignperiod of Rājarāja I. (acc-985 A.D.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājakesari panmaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu tirunaṟaiyū
r nāṭṭut tevatāṉam tirunaṟaiyūr siddheśvaramuṭaiya mahā
devarkku Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār cempiyaṉ māteviyārāṉa pirāntakaṉ mā
tevikaḷār Amutuceyyak kuṭutta veḷḷiyiṉ kai Oṉṟukku
nūṟṟu Eḻupattu nāṟkaḻañcum veḷḷik kalacappāṉai Oṉṟu
muṉṉūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcum poṟkai cāmarai Oṉṟum
kāmeykāppāka nilaṉ mātevan kaṇkāṇiyoṭum kuṭuttatu
paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
